task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Find the commitment text that appears before the "Back this with $5" button and wrap it in a Stripe-style card.

Find the paragraph showing card.commitment (outside any existing card wrapper) and replace with:
<div style={{border:'1px solid #e4e4e4', borderRadius:'8px', padding:'24px 28px', marginBottom:'24px', background:'#fff'}}>
  <p style={{fontSize:'11px', fontWeight:500, color:'#9a9a9a', letterSpacing:'2px', margin:'0 0 12px'}}>YOUR COMMITMENT</p>
  <p style={{fontSize:'14px', color:'#1a1a1a', lineHeight:1.7, margin:0}}>{card.commitment}</p>
</div>

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
Commitment text is in a card with YOUR COMMITMENT label
Same style as other cards
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: change anything else
DO NOT: use ast.parse
